name: voice-ai-pipecat
description: Voice AI assistant: Pipecat + Gemini 2.5 Flash + local faster-whisper STT + Piper TTS

variables.name: AUDIO_INPUT_DEVICE
variables.description: PyAudio input device index for the local mic, or 'default'. main.py logs the enumeration on startup so you can pick the right index for your USB mic.

variables.name: AUDIO_OUTPUT_DEVICE
variables.description: PyAudio output device index for the local speaker, or 'default'.
